name: Save Project State
description: Prepare project state for clean session resumption. Reads workflow conventions from an external vault and updates all state-tracking artifacts.
content:
Save this project so I can return later and resume work with minimal lost context.

Read the workflow instructions from:
C:\Users\josia\Documents\Josiah Hunter Sync Vault\workflow

Use that workflow to determine how project state should be saved for the current project. Be workflow-agnostic in behavior, but use the referenced file path to understand the expected process.

Your job is to prepare this project so I can return later and resume work with minimal lost context. Update the current project state, session information, and any relevant supporting files such as README, card.md, or other state-tracking files that should reflect current progress, decisions, next steps, open questions, blockers, and anything else needed for a clean restart.

The goal is that when I come back and say I want to work on this project again, the model can quickly understand what I was doing, what matters, and what should happen next.
